name: Directional Hallucinations: Ideological Drift in News-Grounded LLM Question Answering

description: arXiv:2607.20487v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to answer questions about political information, including in election-adjacent information settings where factual errors and ideological distortions are high-stakes. We present a reproducible measurement framework that treats hallucinations, unsupported statements in document-grounded QA, as diag...
author: Chendi Wang, Liam Cunningham, Tom Yishay, Jieying Chen
